urdu transliteration text: Mubarak Ho
Lagate haideri nare hai chehre muskurate hai
english translation text: The chant Nara e Haideri, with a smile ontheir faces

urdu transliteration text: Ali ke chahne waale khushi aise manate hai
english translation text: The lovers of Ali, celebrate in this manner

urdu transliteration text: Jahaan shadi ki mehfil ho qaside hum sunate hai
english translation text: Wherever there is a wedding, we will recite praises (of the Ahlul Bayt)

urdu transliteration text: Humaari bandagi mola humari zindagi mola
english translation text: Our devotion, our lives o Master

urdu transliteration text: Nabi ne kehdiya mola jisse bas hai wohi mola
english translation text: Whoever the prophet said was ‘Mawla, is the only Master!

urdu transliteration text: Sikhaya maa ne apni lorio me ya ali mola
english translation text: Our mothers in their stories taught us ‘Ya Ali Mola’

urdu transliteration text: Ghadeere khum ka kissa apne bachon ko sunate hai
english translation text: These mothers have taught the event of Ghadeer to their children

urdu transliteration text: Jo kehlata hai momin, karbala ka hai wo bashinda
english translation text: The one who is called a Momin sees Karbala as his home

urdu transliteration text: mazalim kai mukabil, khoon se rehta hai payinda
english translation text: Against the oppressor he will always remain steadfast

urdu transliteration text: Ali par jaan dekar, ye hamesha hogaye zinda
english translation text: They gave their lives in the name of Ali, but in reality, they are alive

urdu transliteration text: shaheedo k to chehre bhi,(2) kafan me muskurate he
english translation text: The martyrs faces are smiling, even when they are in a kafan

urdu transliteration text: Wila waale yahan per hai wali ka zikr lazim hai
english translation text: The people of ‘Wila’ (Wilayah) are here, so the zikr of the ‘Wali’ (Ali) is obligatory

urdu transliteration text: Khuda waale yahan par hai nabi ka zikr lazim hai
english translation text: The people of God are here, so the zikr of the Prophet is obligatory

urdu transliteration text: Ali waale ki shadi hai, Ali ka zikr lazim hai
english translation text: This is the wedding of a lover of Ali - the zikr of Ali is obligatory

urdu transliteration text: Koi milad karte hain, koi mehfil sajaate hain
english translation text: We are celebrating by praising the Ahlul Bayt (as) and by decorating the mosque

urdu transliteration text: Koi apni khushi ho, panjtan ko shaad rakhte rakhte hain
english translation text: Whenever we celebrate our happiness, we involve the Ahlul Bayt

urdu transliteration text: Charagh akar ke hum farshe wila Abaad rakhte hain
english translation text: We come and adorn the ‘farsh’ of wilaaya

urdu transliteration text: Wo mehfil ho ke majlis karbala ko yaad rakhte hain
english translation text: Whether it is a mehfil or a majlis, we always remember Karbala

urdu transliteration text: Mubarakbad dene ke liye Jibreel aate hai
english translation text: Today, Jibrael has come to give his congratulations

urdu transliteration text: Mubarak ho yeh shadi bas dua hai yeh meri mola
english translation text: We pray that this union remains blessed

urdu transliteration text: Khatija aur hasan ko rehmaton se bhar mere Allah
english translation text: Shower Khatija and Hasan with your mercy o my Lord

urdu transliteration text: Ali ke ishq me sarshaar ho har dum haseen dulha
english translation text: May the groom forever have the love of Ali in his heart

urdu transliteration text: Ataa ho teri rehmat se dulhan ko seerate Zahra
english translation text: May the bride follow in the footsteps of Zahra

urdu transliteration text: Yahan dunya mein aur janat mein bhi qayim rahe rishta
english translation text: May this union remain strong in this world and in the hereafter

urdu transliteration text: Mohabat inme ho bas misle hubbe adam o hawa
english translation text: May their love be like the love of Adam and Hawa

urdu transliteration text: Hai ek nemat to ek rehmat qamar beti ho ya beta
english translation text: May they be blessed with righteous children

urdu transliteration text: Bane awlaad inki nasiraane lashkar e mola
english translation text: May these children be the helpers of the Imam of our time

urdu transliteration text: Utha kar haath hum safdar duaein dete jaate hain
english translation text: We raise our hands and continue to pray for them
